creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to sec from comment #0)

Replicated in main [so: 15] . . .

main [so: 15] pkgbase based world on an OrangePi+ 2ed, ports installed
via pkg:

# ~/pkgbase-snapshot-list.sh 
FreeBSD-*-15.snap20240825201942

(So, somewhat under a month old.)

# pkg info git
git-2.46.0
Name           : git
Version        : 2.46.0
Installed on   : Fri Sep  6 14:04:10 2024 UTC
Origin         : devel/git
Architecture   : FreeBSD:15:armv7
. . .
Annotations    :
	FreeBSD_version: 1500023
	build_timestamp: 2024-09-01T12:45:48+0000
	built_by       : poudriere-git-3.4.2
	cpe            : cpe:2.3:a:git-scm:git:2.46.0:::::freebsd15:armv7
	flavor         : default
	port_checkout_unclean: no
	port_git_hash  : f55e174e411
	ports_top_checkout_unclean: no
	ports_top_git_hash: 15d22e1c70d
	repo_type      : binary
	repository     : FreeBSD
Flat size      : 34.3MiB
. . .

(So, somewhat over 3 week old build.)

Trying FreeBSD directly:

# git clone ssh://anongit@git.FreeBSD.org/src.git
Cloning into 'src'...
remote: Enumerating objects: 4550116, done.
remote: Counting objects: 100% (421315/421315), done.
remote: Compressing objects: 100% (59935/59935), done.
remote: Total 4550116 (delta 394827), reused 367682 (delta 360126), pack-reused 4128801 (from 1)
Receiving objects: 100% (4550116/4550116), 1.72 GiB | 1.12 MiB/s, done..
Resolving deltas: 100% (3604357/3604357), done.
Checking objects: 100% (16777216/16777216), done.
Updating files: 100% (101262/101262), done.

(So, no problem occurred.)

Trying the github based clone, however, gets:

# git clone https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src.git
Cloning into 'freebsd-src'...
remote: Enumerating objects: 5100718, done.
remote: Counting objects: 100% (3351/3351), done.
remote: Compressing objects: 100% (1893/1893), done.
<jemalloc>: jemalloc_rtree.c:205: Failed assertion: "!dependent || leaf != NULL"
fatal: fetch-pack: invalid index-pack output

(So, just the repo size is not all there is to having a problematic context.)
(Also, the problem is not specific to 14.* at all.)

For reference:

(gdb) bt
#0  thr_kill () at thr_kill.S:4
#1  0x206763c4 in __raise (s=6) at /home/pkgbuild/worktrees/main/lib/libc/gen/raise.c:48
#2  0x2073221c in abort () at /home/pkgbuild/worktrees/main/lib/libc/stdlib/abort.c:61
#3  0x2078aa08 in __je_rtree_leaf_elm_lookup_hard (tsdn=<optimized out>, rtree=<optimized out>, rtree_ctx=<optimized out>, key=key@entry=2714496, dependent=<optimized out>, 
    init_missing=<optimized out>) at jemalloc_rtree.c:292
#4  0x2074c3fc in rtree_leaf_elm_lookup (tsdn=0x0, tsdn@entry=0x20000000, rtree_ctx=0x0, rtree_ctx@entry=0x2000002c, key=2714496, dependent=true, init_missing=false, rtree=<optimized out>)
    at /home/pkgbuild/worktrees/main/contrib/jemalloc/include/jemalloc/internal/rtree.h:381
#5  rtree_read (tsdn=0x0, tsdn@entry=0x203db020, rtree=<optimized out>, rtree_ctx=0x0, rtree_ctx@entry=0x203db04c, key=key@entry=2714496, dependent=true)
    at /home/pkgbuild/worktrees/main/contrib/jemalloc/include/jemalloc/internal/rtree.h:406
#6  0x20743f8c in rtree_szind_slab_read (tsdn=0x203db020, key=2714496, dependent=true, r_szind=0xbfbfd5dc, rtree=<optimized out>, rtree_ctx=<optimized out>, r_slab=<optimized out>)
    at /home/pkgbuild/worktrees/main/contrib/jemalloc/include/jemalloc/internal/rtree.h:494
#7  ifree (tsd=0x203db020, ptr=0x296b80, tcache=0x203db140, slow_path=true) at jemalloc_jemalloc.c:2574
#8  0x20743c60 in __je_free_default (ptr=0x296b80) at jemalloc_jemalloc.c:2775
. . .

The assert looks to be the one in /usr/src/contrib/jemalloc/src/rtree.c 's :

static rtree_leaf_elm_t *
rtree_child_leaf_tryread(rtree_node_elm_t *elm, bool dependent) {
        rtree_leaf_elm_t *leaf;

        if (dependent) {
                leaf = (rtree_leaf_elm_t *)atomic_load_p(&elm->child,
                    ATOMIC_RELAXED);
        } else {
                leaf = (rtree_leaf_elm_t *)atomic_load_p(&elm->child,
                    ATOMIC_ACQUIRE);
        }

        assert(!dependent || leaf != NULL);
        return leaf;
}
